name: Allen's Favorite Pot Roast and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound bacon, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. The roast can be coated with any chicken flavoring mix.
2. Preheat the oven and brown the bacon on hot coals until crispy.
3. Add diced onions to the cooked bacon and place the rolled-out roast on top of the bacon grease.
4. Cook the bacon, onion, and roast mixture over medium heat until the roast is browned.
5. Place the dish on hot coals until it is mostly browned.
6. Arrange the cut-up vegetables around the roast, ensuring some pieces are underneath the meat.
7. Transfer the dish to medium-to-hot coals and continue cooking until the vegetables are tender.
8. If needed, add 2 2/3 cups of water to the vegetables to prevent drying out.
